# mailcow_domain_admin (Resource)



## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "mailcow_domain_admin" "support" {
  username = "support-admin"
  password = "supersecret"
  active   = true

  domains = [
    "example.com",
    "example.org",
  ]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `domains` (Set of String) Domains this admin has access to
- `password` (String, Sensitive) Domain admin password
- `username` (String) Domain admin username

### Optional

- `active` (Boolean) Whether this domain admin account is active

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
